metadata.query: best web research tools APIs 2026 academic citation scholarly sources firecrawl alternatives

executiveSummary: In 2026, top web research tools include Perplexity AI Pro and SciSpace for general research and paper explanation, respectively. Consensus AI specializes in synthesizing scientific literature from peer-reviewed sources. Firecrawl offers web scraping and search alternatives.

sources.title: 8 Best AI Research Tools for Professionals & Academics in 2026 — Tested & Ranked
sources.description: 8 best AI research tools for professionals and academics in 2026, tested across literature search, citation analysis, systematic review and source grounding. Elicit, Consensus, Perplexity, Scite & more — honest reviews with pricing.

sources.title: Consensus AI: The Search Engine with 220 Million Scientific Papers (2026 Guide)
sources.description: Consensus AI is the search engine with 220 million peer-reviewed papers, Scholar Agent on GPT-5, and Deep Search. Complete 2026 guide with pricing, features, and comparisons.

sources.title: Best AI Tools for Academic Writing 2026: An ECR Guide
sources.description: Discover 2026’s best AI tools for academic writing. Learn how early-career researchers use ethical AI to strengthen grants, revise manuscripts, and prepare for peer review.
